nasb.text: Woe to you lawyers! For you have taken away the key of knowledge; you yourselves did not enter, and you hindered those who were entering.”

esv.text: Woe to you lawyers! For you have taken away the key of knowledge. You did not enter yourselves, and you hindered those who were entering.”

cnv.text: 你們律法師有禍了！因為你們拿去知識的鑰匙，自己不進去，又阻止要進去的人。”

ccb.text: “律法教师啊，你们有祸了！你们拿走了知识的钥匙，自己不进去，还阻挡那些正要进去的人。”

csbs.text: “你们这些律法师有祸了！因为你们拿去了知识的钥匙，你们自己不进去，还阻止正要进去的人。”
